posts.text: Chinese couples are marrying and trying for children later than in previous generations—one reason why infertility has become more of a problem. Accordingly, demand for IVF has surged https://www.economist.com/china/2026/03/01/china-hopes-ivf-can-slow-its-baby-bust?taid=69a6ee182d686400011a0ed7&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text: BREAKING: Iraq has shut down oil production at Rumaila, the world's second largest oil field which produces 1.5 million barrels of oil per day, amid escalating military activity.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
Part of the due diligence on hydrograph is meeting the team. 

My ethics and integrity radar along with basic research made it clear. 

Dr. Sorensen is a national hero.  (I gave him the superman shirt my kids gave me for Father’s Day) war vet when just out of high school taken in the draft.  Earned his degrees on his return (the most difficult time of his life). Settled on Manhattan Kansas and stayed. Won every award he could win in his job. Inc National professor of the year.  Loved by his students and the community.  Loves star gazing. As teenage he made a massive telescope. Still has it and takes group of kids out into the farms feels by the bus loads during special astrological events. 

This man deserves a Nobel prize. Aerogel world expert. He’s made a career with explosion syntheses.  

It’s understated and honest not as the day is long…. As the life is long.   He is 100% a man you know you can trust.  

He says the graphene is gonna change the world and I believe him.  He’s 78 years old and doesn’t need a penny.  Loving father of one daughter.  Lost is wife and dear life partner to difficult age related disease.   His motivation is entirely science based and mentoring his team.  He the sort of person you wish would adopt you (especially if you lost your father at an young age like I did)

I could on in detail about similarly about Steven Corkill, a man who strong charism and combined with high intelligence and  conservative benchmarking of the hyperion (so that they will always beat production expectations) again tells me he’s someone can trust and I know he has my back. 

The passion of all the Phd’s and master level science experts on team and convos at lunch or diner all gravitate  to enviro science and energy savings.  To the future of making the coolest innovations with their fractal graphene. (Not to money or politics) 

Getting to know these people hang out with them for days wasn’t just helpful to me as an investor it was an honour to be in their presences and enveloped on their genius.  I had to spend months afterword trying to fully comprehend all I was told about fractal graphene aggregates. 

And I studied not for the investment returns or because I didn’t believe them.  It was cause i totally believed them and I wanted to help them.  Connect them with many powerful people and companies that could fast tract them.  Plus get Sorensen enough money quickly so he can get that Bell Labs model going. 

They inspired me and the mission is holy.  It’s a divine pursuit to work with graphene and try to make the world a better place. 

Once you believe in fractal graphene and understand the difference, plus you trust the team… the confidence in the story grows. 

Those that tried to discredit and damage the company and the people supporting it took a huge blow with the EPA approval. 

Soon there will be a major endorsement from a major gas company in partnership. 
Following that I expect the contracts will roll on.  Especially one with a top 10 global auto firm that does a lot more than just cars.  The allow have achieved ‘several successful projects’ with Hydrograph including making plastics for autos 25% better vs the 5% they hoped for and would have been happy with.  

Big companies like this are said to likely each need 1000’s of tonnes. Other major companies will be 1000 tonnes. These big guys add up quickly and we will have very large tonnage orders booked.  A clear path to high profitability and another 10-20x quickly from here. 

Go ahead early shareholders take a little off table and get your initial money back so you’re in a no lose position. For those that read my book you know that always a very comfortable position to be in. But hold on for dear life. This is an  unprecedented stock story. It’s viral story because it touches everything and is so compelling! 

So the work, understand the science and hang on tight!
posts.author: BambroughKevin
